title: CMR Surgical - Surgical Robotics Platform
problem: Minimally invasive surgery reduces patient trauma but requires expensive robotic systems that most hospitals can't afford.
solution: Versatile surgical robot system at lower cost than incumbents. Modular design for broader hospital access.
technology: Surgical robotics, haptic feedback, modular design
regulatory_notes: CE mark, FDA approval pathway, medical device regulations
varden_fit: LOW - Surgical robotics. Different segment from Varden but shows medical device innovation in Europe.
notes: boring_software=false, contrarian=false. UK/EU representation. Surgical robotics innovation.
